creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Walter Heukels from comment #5)
> An additional complication was that this server (still) suffers from the
> "shutdown hangs after freebsd-update" described here: 
> https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2014-October/080599.html

See: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2015-March/081959.html
